---
title: "Resume"
---

You can view or download my resume here:

[Download my resume](Alexandria_Jaimes_Resume.pdf)

::: {.card-section}

## Summary

I'm interested in digital marketing and using creativity, social media, and data to help brands connect with people.

:::

::: {.card-section}

## Skills

- Digital marketing
- Social media
- Content creation
- Data analysis in R
- Quarto reports and websites

:::
